checks.name: phone_visit_card_exists
checks.description: A stable Visit Card exists and is keyed by normalized phone.

checks.name: has_image_request
checks.description: The Visit Card records a real image request and input image evidence.

checks.name: has_voice_interaction
checks.description: The card includes an actual mocked or live voice interaction record.

checks.name: has_multilingual_record
checks.description: The requested language and guide-language behavior are recorded.

checks.name: has_next_recommendation
checks.description: The guide recommends a grounded next stop in the exhibition.

checks.name: live_visit_card_updated
checks.description: The Visit Card moved through multiple states and was not only self-asserted.
